candidates.proposed_title: Malformed CLI --*-json input bypasses JSON error-envelope contract
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: invalid --*-json probe rc=1, stdout empty, stderr raw SystemExit; cli.py raises SystemExit on json.JSONDecodeError.
candidates.observed_behavior: Malformed --mode-json exits 1 with empty stdout and raw stderr.
candidates.expected_behavior: Emit parseable ErrorEnvelope on stdout with VALIDATION_ERROR and exit code 2.
candidates.impact: Agent callers cannot parse standard error envelope for malformed JSON args.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: Malformed CLI --*-json input bypasses JSON error-envelope contract
candidates.validation_command: PYTHONPATH=src TRADE_TRACE_HOME=$(mktemp -d) python3 -m trade_trace.cli report filter_schema --mode-json "{bad"
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Evidence spot-checked by coordinator; concrete failure mode; not a duplicate after root-cause/fix-surface comparison.
candidates.advisor_gate: accepted after advisor critique; static-only candidates scoped with validation gap where applicable

candidates.proposed_title: journal.config_set mutates without --confirm despite confirm/preview contract
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: config_set without confirm wrote config row [(x,y)]; CLI help/admin docs say config_set requires --confirm and otherwise preview_only.
candidates.observed_behavior: journal.config_set writes persistent config without --confirm and no preview metadata.
candidates.impact: Operational safety contract is false for config changes.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: journal.config_set mutates without --confirm despite confirm/preview contract
candidates.validation_command: Temp-home journal init + journal config_set --key x --value y; query config table should have no row until --confirm.
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Evidence spot-checked by coordinator; concrete failure mode; not a duplicate after root-cause/fix-surface comparison.
candidates.advisor_gate: accepted after advisor critique; static-only candidates scoped with validation gap where applicable

candidates.observed_behavior: Full pytest collection aborts with ImportError.
candidates.expected_behavior: Compatibility alias exists or tests/docs use canonical registry; collection succeeds.
candidates.impact: CI/release validation cannot collect suite; public import compatibility broken.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: exporter.SECRET_PATTERNS compatibility alias is missing and blocks pytest collection

candidates.proposed_title: source.add persists secret-shaped title/note/summary free text unredacted
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: source.add note with sk-... returned ok=True; sources.note stored redacted-looking secret; event payload contains secret=True. ledger.py scans excerpt/extracted_text only.
candidates.expected_behavior: All source free-text fields are scanned/rejected or explicitly handled by sensitive/redaction policy.
candidates.impact: Privacy/security boundary gap; raw secrets can enter journal/events/export path.

candidates.proposed_title: forecast.supersede commits replacement forecast before supersedes edge/event
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: ledger.py lines 1389-1397 call _forecast_add then open a second UnitOfWork for edge/event.
candidates.observed_behavior: Second-phase failure can leave replacement forecast without supersedes edge.
candidates.expected_behavior: Replacement forecast/outcomes, supersedes edge, and events commit atomically or roll back.
candidates.impact: Data-integrity risk in forecast lineage after crash/lock/disk failure.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: forecast.supersede commits replacement forecast before supersedes edge/event
candidates.validation_command: Add failure-injection test around forecast.supersede; run idempotency/transaction tests.
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Accepted as static-only data-integrity bug: inspected code contradicts documented/logical atomic operation. Bead must explicitly say not dynamically reproduced and require failure-injection regression.
candidates.advisor_gate: accepted after advisor critique; static-only candidates scoped with validation gap where applicable

candidates.proposed_title: ReportFilter is echoed but ignored by multiple report implementations
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: calibration.py validates ReportFilter then calls _load_scored_rows(conn) globally; delegate found same pattern in tag_aggregates/watchlist/unscored/playbook_adherence.
candidates.observed_behavior: Reports accept/echo filters but compute over global or over-broad rows.
candidates.expected_behavior: Apply supported filters or reject unsupported filter fields; never echo ignored filters as applied.
candidates.impact: Agents can make strategy/time/instrument decisions from falsely scoped reports.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: ReportFilter is echoed but ignored by multiple report implementations
candidates.validation_command: Seed mixed data and run report.calibration/report.playbook_adherence with filters; metrics/record_ids must exclude non-matching rows.
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Evidence spot-checked by coordinator; concrete failure mode; not a duplicate after root-cause/fix-surface comparison.
candidates.advisor_gate: accepted after advisor critique; static-only candidates scoped with validation gap where applicable

candidates.proposed_title: memory.reflect documents atomic reflection+about edge but uses two transactions
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: memory.py docstring promises one transaction; code calls _memory_retain then opens a second UnitOfWork for edge.
candidates.observed_behavior: Failure after node commit can leave orphan reflection node.
candidates.expected_behavior: Reflection node, about edge, and events are in one transaction.
candidates.impact: Memory graph integrity can be violated under partial failure.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: memory.reflect documents atomic reflection+about edge but uses two transactions
candidates.validation_command: Failure-injection test around memory.reflect edge insert; orphan invariant remains zero.
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Accepted as static-only data-integrity bug: inspected code contradicts documented/logical atomic operation. Bead must explicitly say not dynamically reproduced and require failure-injection regression.
candidates.advisor_gate: accepted after advisor critique; static-only candidates scoped with validation gap where applicable

candidates.proposed_title: memory.reflect idempotent retry without valid_from returns IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: repeating memory.reflect with same idempotency_key returned IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT diff_keys=[valid_from]; _memory_retain defaults valid_from to created_at only on first write but replay recomputes None/current.
candidates.observed_behavior: Same logical retry conflicts because default valid_from differs.
candidates.expected_behavior: Same idempotency key and same caller args replay the original result without conflict.
candidates.impact: Retry safety is broken for memory.reflect/memory.retain calls that omit valid_from.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: memory.reflect idempotent retry without valid_from returns IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
candidates.validation_command: Temp dispatch memory.reflect twice with same idempotency_key and no valid_from; second should ok/replay, not conflict.
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Evidence spot-checked by coordinator; concrete failure mode; not a duplicate after root-cause/fix-surface comparison.
candidates.advisor_gate: accepted after advisor critique; static-only candidates scoped with validation gap where applicable

candidates.proposed_title: memory.recall applies min_confidence after top-k truncation
candidates.evidence: memory.py lines 526-549: scored sorted, top=scored[:k], then min_confidence filters top only.
candidates.observed_behavior: Eligible lower-ranked nodes are omitted if low-confidence nodes occupy top-k slots.
candidates.expected_behavior: Filter by min_confidence before final top-k or continue until k eligible items.
candidates.impact: Recall can underfill context budget despite available eligible memories.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: memory.recall applies min_confidence after top-k truncation
candidates.validation_command: Regression with k=3, one low-confidence top-ranked node, eligible rank-4 item; expect 3 eligible results.
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Advisor flagged as needing synthetic repro or clearer API contract. Static evidence retained, but not materialized as implementation-ready bug in this run.

candidates.proposed_title: reflection.prompt_for_outcome selects earliest instrument forecast, not outcome-linked forecast
candidates.evidence: primary_evidence.txt: reflection.py lines 60-74 selects earliest forecast by instrument_id and does not join forecast_scores/outcome_id.
candidates.observed_behavior: Later outcomes may produce prompt packet for stale unrelated forecast.
candidates.expected_behavior: Use forecast_scores.forecast_id for the specific outcome where available, or expose ambiguity.
candidates.impact: Agents can reflect on wrong forecast/thesis and write bad learning.
candidates.proposed_bead_title: reflection.prompt_for_outcome selects earliest instrument forecast, not outcome-linked forecast
candidates.validation_command: Seed two forecasts/outcomes on same instrument; prompt_for_outcome(later outcome) should select later scored forecast.
acceptance_criteria: Regression test or equivalent validation covers the case
candidates.disposition_reason: Advisor flagged as needing outcome-linked forecast contract/repro. Static evidence retained, but not materialized as implementation-ready bug in this run.

advisor_disposition_summary: Advisor requested narrowing/merges. Applied: CAND-009 and CAND-010 deferred; CAND-013 merged into CAND-012; CAND-005/CAND-007 kept as static-only with failure-injection validation gap; CAND-003/CAND-014 separate; CAND-011 separate.
